description.en: The golden pheasant is a spectacular forest bird boasting some of the most vibrant and colorful plumage in the avian world.
description.zh: 红腹锦鸡是一种极其华丽的森林鸟类，拥有鸟类世界中最鲜艳、色彩最丰富的羽毛。

anatomy.en: Males are breathtakingly beautiful, featuring a golden crest, a bright red body, and a long, elegantly patterned tail. Females, on the other hand, are a mottled brown color to stay camouflaged while sitting on their nests.
anatomy.zh: 雄鸟美得令人惊叹，拥有金黄色的羽冠、鲜红的身体以及一条布满优雅花纹的长尾巴。相比之下，雌鸟则呈斑驳的褐色，以便在孵蛋时进行完美伪装。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are clumsy flyers and prefer to run on the ground to escape danger. During the mating season, males perform a stunning courtship dance, spreading their neck feathers like a colorful cape to impress the females.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们是不太灵光的飞行者，遇到危险时更喜欢在地面上奔跑逃跑。在繁殖季节，雄鸟会跳起令人惊叹的求偶舞，将颈部的羽毛像彩色披风一样展开，以吸引雌鸟。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They are native to the dense, mountainous forests of western and central China. Due to their beauty, feral populations have also been established in countries like the UK.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们原产于中国中西部茂密的山地森林中。由于它们的美丽，在英国等国家也建立了野化种群。
